Article: MUSIC How many versions of Cruel Angels Thesis and quot
[]: [MUSIC] How many versions of "Cruel Angel's Thesis&quot             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Wed Oct 04, 2006 12:36 am I think I found over 9 versions of the song (And yes, I downloaded them all.) 1. The Original Version (Classic is always cool) 2. Live Version sang by Shinji's Japanese V/A (Note the Shinji-scream) 3. Piano/Guitar Version (As heard on the last episode) 4. Violin Version (Same as above) 5. Ambivalence Version (More guitars and sounds much clearer) 6. Punk Version (VERRRY cool driving music) 7. "Techno" version (Think DDR meets Eva) 8. Asuka/Misato/Rei Version (I think these are the original Japanese V/A's) 9. Instrumental version (Exactly as the original one, except no audio) Are there more, or did I mention them all?

[]: Re: How Many Version Of "Cruel Angel Thesis Are There&a             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Oct 04, 2006 1:41 am KhakiBlueThunderSocks wrote: ...9. Instrumental version (Exactly as the original one, except no audio )...

[]: Re: How Many Version Of "Cruel Angel Thesis Are There&a             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 04, 2006 8:41 am KhakiBlueThunderSocks wrote: (And yes, I downloaded them all.)

 original one, except no audio)

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Wed Oct 04, 2006 5:30 pm Where would some of these be from, because I've got most of the soundtracks and I only have found six. The original, the same only "TV Sized" (OST 2), the "remix" which didn't sound that much different, the one with Rei, Asuka, and Misato. Also have the two from episode twenty six.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Wed Oct 04, 2006 6:09 pm Theres the Jazzy upbeat version on the 10th Anniversary/Decade Soundtrack. It's actually called 10th Anniversary Version.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo2.0 » Wed Oct 04, 2006 9:05 pm Dont forget the Euro eddition

[]: Re: How Many Version Of "Cruel Angel Thesis Are There&a             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Thu Oct 05, 2006 1:02 am Hexon.Arq wrote: KhakiBlueThunderSocks wrote: 9. Instrumental version (Exactly as the original one, except no audio)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 05, 2006 8:36 pm I just bumped into a fellow Mt. A anime club member who happens to own a few of the NGE soundtracks. According to her, the OST 3 disc has twelve(!) version of FMttM. I'll see if I can borrow it and find out what they are.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 05, 2006 10:29 pm This thread's about "Cruel Angel's Thesis", not "Fly Me", I thought...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 05, 2006 10:31 pm Ack! Severe brain fart! Cutting connections starting from 2401! I should go to bed, but those burned brownies I made earlier won't let me.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Fri Oct 06, 2006 11:56 am jcmoorehead wrote: Theres the Jazzy upbeat version on the 10th Anniversary/

Article: MUSIC How many versions of Cruel Angels Thesis and quot
 me.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Fri Oct 06, 2006 11:56 am jcmoorehead wrote: Theres the Jazzy upbeat version on the 10th Anniversary/Decade Soundtrack. It's actually called 10th Anniversary Version.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Oct 06, 2006 5:03 pm There was one on the S^2 works thingy that I really liked; It was a strings version like the one used in the last episode only at the tempo of the regular version. Reminded me of the Highwind music from FFVII.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Apr 15, 2008 7:18 pm 10.Cruel Angel Thesis(A.D 2001) 11.Thesis of Cruel Angel(Megumi Hayashi) 12.Cruel Angel Thesis(Robot Taisen Super F original SounCrdtrack 13.Cruel Angel Thesis(Robot Taisen Super F Kanket 14.Cruel Angel Thesis(Shimokawa Mikuni) 15.Cruel Angel Thesis(Spliced version) 16.Cruel Angel Thesis(Ovra) 17.Zankoku_na_Tenshi_na_TEIZE 18.Cruel Angel Thesis(Sung by Shoko) There's actually 18 versions.You can find most of these on Esnips.The spliced version you can search on youtube for.And the two robot ones you can find on gh.ffshrine.org/.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Apr 15, 2008 7:58 pm I think only a show's theme and its instrumental versions used for background music are really all that's necessary. Most of the versions sung by anyone else were probably produced to make some easy cash or cred for themselves. 18 versions . . . geez, that's a lot. It's a good thing the people who made Pokemon didn't think of that. I could see it now: Kid - "Mommy! Mommy! Can you buy me the Ultra Radiant Pink Version of Pokemon?" Mom - "No sweetie, you already have the Neon Yellow, Fabulous Purple, Dope Blue, Emo Black, Coke White, Burning Rash Orange, Cannabis Green, Narcotic Psychodelic, and Tomato Red Versions."

[]:

Article: MUSIC How many versions of Cruel Angels Thesis and quot
 - "No sweetie, you already have the Neon Yellow, Fabulous Purple, Dope Blue, Emo Black, Coke White, Burning Rash Orange, Cannabis Green, Narcotic Psychodelic, and Tomato Red Versions."

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Apr 15, 2008 9:17 pm No kidding.That be a freaking nightmare.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Tue Apr 15, 2008 9:19 pm 19, actually. me. just now. with windows sound recorder. oh, and i forget the lyrics halfway and end up freestyling.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Hand » Tue Apr 15, 2008 9:30 pm Well,actually.I may be wrong.There might be 19 versions because I found this version too.Cruel Angel Thesis (A5 Remix).It's on a site called Imeem.com.It's pretty awsome.

[]:             Quote Post by tian2992 » Mon May 05, 2008 1:54 am There are Two instrumental versions at OST 3: One called "The Heady Feeling of Freedom" which has strings but no piano and no Lyrics and "Good, or Don't Be" which is the final theme of the series, which has piano and has a small interlude near the end. Also I have an alternate Full Version, probably the one with Rei, Asuka and Misato… The TV cut The Directors Cut The 10th Anniversary Version The Directors cut at Refrain of Evangelion (which has added echoes and some tones sound higher…) I didn't liked Megumi's live version… @Space Penis it is probably "The Heady Feeling of Freedom"… @BobBQ yeah, it is insane, there are a whole bunch of versions, but I liked Utada's most ;)
